name: Balkrishna Paper Mills Limited
summary: Balkrishna Paper Mills Limited manufactures and sells paper and paper boards in India. It offers eco, chromo white back, eco-white, eco kraft back, and duplex coated boards. The company's coated duplex boards are primarily used for packaging by various industries, such as pharmaceuticals, toiletries, cosmetics, health care products, readymade garments, instant food products, match boxes, and incense sticks, as well as FMCG segments. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Nirvikara Paper Mills Limited and changed its name to Balkrishna Paper Mills Limited in August 2016. Balkrishna Paper Mills Limited was founded in 1975 and is based in Mumbai, India.
